sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map_subtract (key_array Array(Int32), value_array Array(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_map_subtract SET value_array = mapSubtract((key_array, value_array), ([1], [1])) WHERE key_array = [1];
SELECT key_array, value_array, mapSubtract((key_array, value_array), ([2], [20])) AS updated_result FROM test_map_subtract;
